variants: Jana Blahova specializes in the field of Systems Biology, where she has developed a notable research portfolio. She was guided throughout her studies by her mentor, Eliya Reshetnikov, who provided invaluable insights and support. Her projects have primarily been funded by the Illume Venture Society, allowing her to investigate complex biological systems. Aside from her academic work, Jana also holds an Illusionist Culinary Permit, which showcases her interest in the culinary arts. Her research findings have been frequently published in the Summit Shelf Journal, solidifying her presence in the academic community.
